post.description: Creates WhatsApp template in Meta first. Business must have `metaWabaId` and `metaAccessToken` set via `/v1/business/whatsapp`. Returns error when Meta status is REJECTED.

templateBody.example: Hai [nama], sudah sebulan sejak Facial Treatment terakhir kamu di [bisnis].
Hai [nama], waktunya hair treatment premium lagi di [bisnis].
Halo 1! Sudah 2 hari sejak 3 terakhir kamu di 4. Yuk balik lagi — kami tunggu! 😊
